question: How should I build a dynamic scrolling list in Rive and populate it from React data?
required_concepts: Use a View Model List property bound to an Artboard List
Use layouts and Scroll Constraint for scrolling behavior
Create independent item view model instances at runtime
red_flags: Recommends duplicating artboards manually for runtime data
Uses legacy Inputs as the primary list data mechanism
Omits the item view model contract
ideal_answer_shape: Start with the editor hierarchy and view models
End with performance notes for large lists
